## Risk Areas

Check any affected areas:

- [ ] Architecture or repo layout
- [ ] Domain rules or business workflow
- [ ] Auth/MSAL/Entra/runtime config
- [ ] Environment variables
- [ ] SQL schema, migrations, audit fields, or repository conventions
- [ ] API routes or response contracts
- [ ] Shared Angular components, services, styles, or UI patterns
- [ ] Azure Blob Storage, SharePoint, Fieldwire, or external integrations
- [ ] Generated/build output
